tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsNotesList
tools.description: Lists notes for the specified project.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsNotesOccurrencesList
tools.description: Lists occurrences referencing the specified note. Provider projects can use this method to get all occurrences across consumer projects referencing the specified note.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesDelete
tools.description: Deletes the specified occurrence. For example, use this method to delete an occurrence when the occurrence is no longer applicable for the given resource.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a note or an occurrence resource. Requires `containeranalysis.notes.setIamPolicy` or `containeranalysis.occurrences.setIamPolicy` permission if the resource is a note or occurrence, respectively. The resource takes the format `projects/[PROJECT_ID]/notes/[NOTE_ID]` for notes and `projects/[PROJECT_ID]/occurrences/[OCCURRENCE_ID]` for occurrences.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesGetNotes
tools.description: Gets the note attached to the specified occurrence. Consumer projects can use this method to get a note that belongs to a provider project.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesGetVulnerabilitySummary
tools.description: Gets a summary of the number and severity of occurrences.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesList
tools.description: Lists occurrences for the specified project.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified note or occurrence. Requires `containeranalysis.notes.setIamPolicy` or `containeranalysis.occurrences.setIamPolicy` permission if the resource is a note or an occurrence, respectively. The resource takes the format `projects/[PROJECT_ID]/notes/[NOTE_ID]` for notes and `projects/[PROJECT_ID]/occurrences/[OCCURRENCE_ID]` for occurrences.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsOccurrencesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns the permissions that a caller has on the specified note or occurrence. Requires list permission on the project (for example, `containeranalysis.notes.list`). The resource takes the format `projects/[PROJECT_ID]/notes/[NOTE_ID]` for notes and `projects/[PROJECT_ID]/occurrences/[OCCURRENCE_ID]` for occurrences.

tools.name: projects.containeranalysisProjectsResourcesGeneratePackagesSummary
tools.description: Gets a summary of the packages within a given resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
